steps.title: Apply the distributive property
steps.content:
Distribute $6x$ to each term in the parentheses:
$$6x(x+3) = 6x \cdot x + 6x \cdot 3$$

steps.title: Simplify and identify the equivalent expression
steps.content:
Multiply each term:
  • $6x \cdot x = 6x^2$
  • $6x \cdot 3 = 18x$
Combining these gives $6x^2 + 18x$. That matches choice B — B is correct.
